programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A boys close encounter with an alien stranded on Earth leads to a unique friendship in Steven Spielbergs Oscar-winning film. Starring Henry Thomas, Dee Wallace, Peter Coyote.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the labs classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.sub-title: The World Should Be Afraid Of Us
programme.desc: As Valmonts mission changes his feelings for Camille, she goes to extreme lengths to secure her future.

programme.title: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: Camille and Valmont make shocking discoveries at a grand society ball.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: During the war in Afghanistan, an intelligence officer (Paul Gross) enlists a sniper (Rossif Sutherland) to track down a legendary freedom fighter. Starring Rossif Sutherland, Paul Gross, Christine Horne.

programme.title: Laurence Anyways
programme.desc: In the 90s, Laurence tells his girlfriend, Fred, that he wants to become a woman; they confront the prejudices of their friends, ignore the council of their families and brave the phobias of the society they offend. Starring Melvil Poupaud, Suzanne Clement, Nathalie Baye.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen returns to find that the sanctuary has been trashed and members of the team have been attacking one another.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductors identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: Tired of weathering constant attacks on their colony, ants shrink a destructive boy (Zach Tyler Eisen) to their size and sentence him to live among them until he learns the errors of his ways. Starring Zachery Tyler, Julia Roberts, Meryl Streep.

programme.title: The Iron Giant
programme.desc: A malevolent government agent threatens to destroy the friendship between a boy and a huge alien robot. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Eli Marienthal, Harry Connick.

programme.title: Sesame Street Presents: Follow That Bird
programme.desc: Big Bird, whisked away to Illinois by a misguided social worker, sets out to rejoin his friends in New York. Starring Paul Bartel, Sandra Bernhard, John Candy.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Switching Goals
programme.desc: Soccer-playing twins (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) decide to help their father (Eric Lutes), a coach seeking a seventh championship title. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Eric Lutes.

programme.title: Ever After: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: Treated as a servant by her stepmother (Anjelica Huston), a 16th-century woman (Drew Barrymore) wins the heart of the French prince (Dougray Scott). Starring Drew Barrymore, Anjelica Huston, Dougray Scott.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: A man tells a story to a woman about two young people who become lovers in the 1940s North Carolina. Starring Ryan Gosling, Rachel McAdams, James Garner.

programme.title: Small Things Like These
programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town thats controlled by the Roman Catholic Church. Starring Cillian Murphy, Eileen Walsh, Michelle Fairley.

programme.title: Away From Her
programme.desc: A man (Gordon Pinsent) becomes confused and angry when his wife (Julie Christie), an Alzheimers patient, seems to prefer the company of another resident at her nursing home. Starring Julie Christie, Gordon Pinsent, Olympia Dukakis.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: A new plan to conquer their past ghosts puts Camille and Valmont in danger.

programme.title: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: Camille and Valmont continue to fight for their freedom, unaware of the threat of a returning figure.

programme.title: Below Her Mouth
programme.desc: An unexpected affair between two women develops into a passionate connection that changes their lives. Starring Natalie Krill, Erika Linder, Mayko Nguyen.

programme.title: Nurse.Fighter.Boy
programme.desc: An urban love story tells of the heart of a fighter. Starring Clark Johnson, Karen LeBlanc, Daniel J. Gordon.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henrys double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Step Dogs
programme.desc: Meatball, a wise cracking country dog, and Cassie, Hollywoods most pampered pet, meet when their owners get married. The two fight constantly until burglars break into their house, and they must team up to protect their home. Starring Dylan Schmid, Brittney Wilson, Eliana Jones.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the towns full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Adopted by the Littles (Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki), a mouse has various adventures which make him appreciate love and family. Starring Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: Chaos reigns when two clueless fathers (Cuba Gooding Jr., Paul Rae) take charge of a dilapidated summer camp and its ill-behaved attendees. Starring Cuba Gooding, Lochlyn Munro, Paul Rae.

programme.title: Coraline
programme.desc: A girl finds a secret door in her new home and walks into an alternate reality that closely mirrors her own but, in many ways, is better. Starring Dakota Fanning, Teri Hatcher, Jennifer Saunders.

programme.title: Casper
programme.desc: A teen (Christina Ricci) who lost her mother befriends friendly ghost Casper while staying at a mean heiresss (Cathy Moriarty) haunted mansion. Starring Christina Ricci, Bill Pullman, Cathy Moriarty.

programme.title: Practical Magic
programme.desc: Raised by their aunts, two sisters born into a magical family use different means to avoid a family legacy of witchcraft. Starring Sandra Bullock, Nicole Kidman, Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Lord Lovat goes to extreme lengths to fulfill a prophecy; Dougal attends a clandestine meeting that could spell political disaster for the MacKenzies.

programme.title: The Silent Twins
programme.desc: June and Jennifer Gibbons are twins from the only Black family in a small town. After a spree of vandalism, the girls are sentenced to Broadmoor, an infamous psychiatric hospital, where they face the choice to separate and survive or die together. Starring Letitia Wright, Tamara Lawrance, Nadine Marshall.

programme.title: Passchendaele
programme.desc: Sgt. Dunne (Paul Gross) returns to war to look after a nurses brother. Starring Caroline Dhavernas, Gil Bellows, Paul Gross.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Nels Coxmans quiet life as a snowplow driver comes crashing down when his beloved son dies under mysterious circumstances. His search for the truth soon becomes a quest for revenge against a psychotic drug lord named Viking and his sleazy henchmen. Starring Liam Neeson, Tom Bateman, Tom Jackson.

programme.title: Take This Waltz
programme.desc: A young woman (Michelle Williams) is torn between the husband (Seth Rogen) that she loves and a new man (Luke Kirby) in her life, whom shes unable to ignore. Starring Michelle Williams, Seth Rogen, Luke Kirby.

programme.title: Snowtime!
programme.desc: Children (Angela Gallupo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball) in a small village learn valuable life lessons when they form two teams for a massive snowball fight. Starring Angela Galuppo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball.

programme.title: The Swan Princess
programme.desc: A vengeful wizard curses a princess to exist as a swan by day until her prince declares his undying love. Starring Jack Palance, Michelle Nicastro, John Cleese.

programme.title: Ice Age
programme.desc: A woolly mammoth (Ray Romano), a saber-toothed tiger (Denis Leary) and a sloth (John Leguizamo) find a human baby and try to reunite him with his tribe. Starring Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary.

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) reunite to warn their friends about the danger to their homes posed by swiftly melting ice. Starring Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary.

programme.title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Manny (Ray Romano), Diego (Denis Leary) and the rest of the gang must rescue Sid (John Leguizamo) from an underground world after Sid steals some dinosaur eggs. Starring Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrats pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Diego (Denis Leary) and Sid (John Leguizamo). Starring Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world. Starring Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely terrapin warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil (Megan Fox) to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions. Starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett, William Fichtner.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder (Brian Tee), mad scientist Baxter Stockman (Tyler Perry), Bebop (Gary Anthony Williams), Rocksteady (Stephen "Sheamus" Farrelly) and the notorious Krang (Brad Garrett). Starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett, Laura Linney.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: A Denver man (Jason Bateman) tracks down the Florida woman (Melissa McCarthy) who stole his identity, financed a luxurious lifestyle, and destroyed his credit. Starring Jason Bateman, Melissa McCarthy, Jon Favreau.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two deskbound detectives get more than they bargain for when they take on a seemingly minor case that may turn out to be New Yorks biggest crime. Starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Eva Mendes.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Father and stepfather Dusty and Brad join forces to make Christmastime perfect for the children. Their newfound partnership soon gets put to the test when Dustys old-school, macho dad and Brads gentle father arrive to turn the holiday upside down. Starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: A drifter (John Garfield) stops at a Greek diner and helps the owners (Cecil Kellaway) lusty wife (Lana Turner) become a widow. Starring Lana Turner, John Garfield, Cecil Kellaway.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: A scrap-metal tycoon (Broderick Crawford) pays a Washington newsman (William Holden) to make his girlfriend (Judy Holliday) couth. Starring Judy Holliday, William Holden, Broderick Crawford.

programme.title: Pat and Mike
programme.desc: Pat Pemberton, a college athletics instructor, enters a number of golf matches against female professionals; sports manager Mike Donovan sees her talent and offers to train her. Starring Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn, Aldo Ray.

programme.title: Travels With My Aunt
programme.desc: An English bankers boring existence is shattered by the globe-trotting adventure he shares with his eccentric aunt. Starring Maggie Smith, Alec McCowen, Louis Gossett.

programme.title: The Women
programme.desc: Catty New York socialites gossip about a friend (Norma Shearer) and her husbands girlfriend (Joan Crawford). Starring Norma Shearer, Joan Crawford, Rosalind Russell.

programme.title: A Life of Her Own
programme.desc: A top New York model (Lana Turner) has an affair with a millionaire (Ray Milland) whose wife is disabled. Starring Lana Turner, Ray Milland, Tom Ewell.

programme.title: In the Money
programme.desc: The Bowery Boys tangle with Scotland Yard, diamond smugglers and a gem-toting canine during an ocean cruise. Starring Bowery Boys, Patricia Donahue, Leonard Penn.

programme.title: Postmark for Danger
programme.desc: An actress (Terry Moore) and an artist (Robert Beatty) are linked by his brother (William Sylvester) to deadly smugglers sought by Scotland Yard. Starring Terry Moore, Robert Beatty, William Sylvester.

programme.title: The Last of Mrs. Cheyney
programme.desc: A jewel thief (Joan Crawford) and her partner (William Powell) corner British aristocrats on a country weekend. Starring Joan Crawford, William Powell, Robert Montgomery.

programme.title: Calling Bulldog Drummond
programme.desc: The British sleuth (Walter Pidgeon) leaves retirement to help a Scotland Yard woman (Margaret Leighton) catch thieves armed with radar. Starring Walter Pidgeon, Margaret Leighton, Robert Beatty.

programme.title: The Woman in Green
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates when young women around London turn up murdered, each with a finger severed. Scotland Yard suspects a madman, but Holmes believes the killings to be part of a diabolical plot. Starring Basil Rathbone, Nigel Bruce, Hillary Brooke.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: A London housewife (Sylvia Sidney) learns that her husband (Oscar Homolka) is helping a secret group planting bombs in public places. Starring Sylvia Sidney, Oscar Homolka, Desmond Tester.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: A former Scotland Yard superintendent attempts to commit the perfect murder in the hopes of discrediting his successor. Starring Sydney Greenstreet, Peter Lorre, Joan Lorring.

programme.title: Green for Danger
programme.desc: A Scotland Yard inspector sorts through five suspects as a rash of murders plagues a rural British hospital. Starring Alastair Sim, Trevor Howard, Sally Gray.

programme.title: Lured
programme.desc: An American dancer (Lucille Ball) living in London helps Scotland Yard identify a murderer who preys on lonely women. Starring George Sanders, Lucille Ball, Charles Coburn.

programme.title: Lone Star
programme.desc: A small-town Texas sheriff (Chris Cooper) investigates when a brutal predecessors remains surface 40 years after he was supposedly run out of town. Starring Chris Cooper, Elizabeth Peña, Joe Morton.

programme.title: Honeysuckle Rose
programme.desc: A country singer (Willie Nelson) loves his wife (Dyan Cannon), drinks too much and fools around with his ex-partners daughter (Amy Irving). Starring Willie Nelson, Dyan Cannon, Amy Irving.

programme.title: Blood Simple
programme.desc: Complications arise when the owner of a Texas bar pays a man (M. Emmet Walsh) to kill his wife (Frances McDormand) and her lover (John Getz). Starring John Getz, Frances McDormand, M. Emmet Walsh.

programme.title: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Acclaimed account of the gun-toting bank robbers and the trail of terror they blazed through the Southwest in the 30s. Starring Warren Beatty, Faye Dunaway, Michael J. Pollard.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: A bank robber (Steve McQueen) and his wife (Ali MacGraw) cross a big shot (Ben Johnson) and are chased to the Mexican border. Starring Steve McQueen, Ali MacGraw, Ben Johnson.

programme.title: Destination Tokyo
programme.desc: A submarine captain (Cary Grant) handles Tokyo Bay, depth charges, a lodged bomb and a crewmans rush appendectomy. Starring Cary Grant, John Garfield, Alan Hale.

programme.title: Dark Passage
programme.desc: A San Francisco art student (Lauren Bacall) hides a fugitive (Humphrey Bogart) recovering from underworld plastic surgery. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Lauren Bacall, Bruce Bennett.

programme.title: A Summer Place
programme.desc: A man (Richard Egan) and a womans (Dorothy McGuire) Maine-coast adultery parallels his teenage daughters (Sandra Dee) romance with her son. Starring Richard Egan, Dorothy McGuire, Sandra Dee.

programme.title: Susan Slade
programme.desc: A poor writer (Troy Donahue) rivals a rich mans son for a young woman (Connie Stevens) with a secret out-of-wedlock child. Starring Troy Donahue, Connie Stevens, Dorothy McGuire.

programme.title: Rome Adventure
programme.desc: An art student (Troy Donahue), his ex-girlfriend (Angie Dickinson), a librarian (Suzanne Pleshette) and a local charmer cross paths in Italy. Starring Troy Donahue, Suzanne Pleshette, Angie Dickinson.

programme.title: Spencers Mountain
programme.desc: The Wyoming Spencers (Henry Fonda, Maureen OHara) have nine children, too small a house and a son (James MacArthur) who wants to go to college. Starring Henry Fonda, Maureen OHara, James MacArthur.

programme.title: The Masque of the Red Death
programme.desc: A tyrannical 12th-century prince is intrigued by a girl and takes her to live amid the immorality of his court. Starring Vincent Price, Hazel Court, Jane Asher.

programme.title: The Wild Angels
programme.desc: An outlaw biker (Peter Fonda) in black leather invades a Southern California beach town with his gang. Starring Peter Fonda, Nancy Sinatra, Bruce Dern.

programme.title: The Trip
programme.desc: Bummed out by his wife (Susan Strasberg), a California TV director (Peter Fonda) takes LSD and has a psychedelic experience. Starring Peter Fonda, Susan Strasberg, Bruce Dern.

programme.title: Gas-s-s-s
programme.desc: Texas survivors (Robert Corff, Elaine Giftos, Ben Vereen) head for a New Mexico commune after nerve gas kills everyone over 25. Starring Robert Corff, Elaine Giftos, Ben Vereen.

programme.title: Bloody Mama
programme.desc: Tommy-gun-toting Ma Barker (Shelley Winters) leads her deranged sons and gang on a 1930s crime spree. Starring Shelley Winters, Pat Hingle, Don Stroud.

programme.title: Back From Eternity
programme.desc: A pilot (Robert Ryan), a hooker (Anita Ekberg), a killer (Rod Steiger) and eight others crash among headhunters, but only five can leave. Starring Robert Ryan, Anita Ekberg, Rod Steiger.

programme.title: Romance on the High Seas
programme.desc: A man (Don DeFore) hires a private eye (Jack Carson) to watch his wife (Janis Paige) on a cruise, but the wife sends an impostor. Starring Jack Carson, Janis Paige, Don DeFore.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: Tarzan and the Lost Safari
programme.desc: Tarzan runs into complications while leading the wealthy survivors of a plane crash out of the jungle. Starring Gordon Scott, Robert Beatty, Yolande Donlan.

programme.title: Buried Loot
programme.desc: An embezzler breaks out of prison and returns to the spot where he hid his stolen money. Starring George Irving, James Ellison, Al Hill.

programme.title: Kismet
programme.desc: A roguish poet is given the run of the scheming Wazirs harem while pretending to help him usurp the young caliph. Starring Howard Keel, Ann Blyth, Dolores Gray.

programme.title: This Happy Breed
programme.desc: An adaptation of Noel Cowards play traces a number of years in the life of a middle-class London family. Starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, John Mills.

programme.title: Somebody Up There Likes Me
programme.desc: A youth turns his rebellious nature into a successful ring career in this fact-based portrait of boxer Rocky Graziano. Starring Paul Newman, Pier Angeli, Everett Sloane.

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: A husbands plot to murder his unfaithful wife goes awry in Alfred Hitchcocks adaptation of the Frederick Knott play. Starring Ray Milland, Grace Kelly, Bob Cummings.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A small-time London gangster (Michael Caine) ties his brothers murder to a porno movie and a crime boss. Starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland.

programme.title: Deathtrap
programme.desc: A cat-and-mouse game ensues when a blocked Broadway playwright (Michael Caine) and his wife (Dyan Cannon) meet a fan (Christopher Reeve) with an excellent script. Starring Michael Caine, Christopher Reeve, Dyan Cannon.

programme.title: Bad Blonde
programme.desc: An Italian boxing managers (Frederick Valk) wife (Barbara Payton) tricks her heavyweight Irish lover (Tony Wright) into helping kill her husband. Starring Barbara Payton, Frederick Valk, Tony Wright.

programme.title: The Bad Seed
programme.desc: Odd fatal accidents lead a woman (Nancy Kelly) to realize that her 8-year-old daughter (Patty McCormack) was born to kill. Starring Nancy Kelly, Patty McCormack, Henry Jones.

programme.title: The Colour of Ink
programme.desc: Toronto inkmaker Jason S. Logan harvests colors from wild weeds, berries, bark, flowers, rocks and rust to send custom-made inks to artists around the world, from a New York cartoonist to a Tokyo calligrapher.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole
programme.desc: Marc Fennell travels to the Pyramids of Giza, down the Nile and to the very heart of the British Empire to uncover the truth of how the ancient Egyptian mummified remains of a child ended up in Australias oldest university.

programme.title: Boiling Point
programme.desc: The team hosts their first wedding reception; Jamie returns to work; Robyns audition doesnt go as hoped, and her bad day continues at the restaurant.

programme.title: Raw Almond
programme.desc: A uniquely designed pop-up restaurant springs to life for 22 days amidst the frozen expanse of one of Canadas coldest provinces.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldnt be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe its time to take a chance on love. Starring Golda Rosheuvel, John Hannah, Sophie Cookson.

programme.title: Bif Naked

Starring George Stroumboulopoulos, Jann Arden, Bif Naked.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman

programme.title: Barons

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: In 1999, Jacksonville store owner Saad Kawaf is attacked in his driveway, leading to a murder and robbery; his wife survives, bound and terrorized; the case goes cold for two decades until DNA technology exposes suspects.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: A successful married womans life is put in turmoil when she reunites with an old high school rival at her twenty-year high school reunion. Starring April Bowlby, Kim Director, Hanna Hall.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When seven Rockwell paintings and a fake Renoir are stolen from Elayne Galleries in 1978, a relentless gallery owner uncovers an art theft underworld.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: When a colonels wife discovers her husbands startling double life, she must choose between her own future and the good of the U.S. military; she overcomes betrayal to launch a one-woman campaign to protect other military spouses.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A honeymoon cruise goes awry when the bride is allegedly blown off a balcony in the middle of the night; but when the weather report comes in for the evening showing no wind, a murder investigation begins.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A surprise cruise vacation for a husband and wife from Olympia, Washington ends up with one of them going overboard; is it revenge, jealousy or a murderous impulse at sea?

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A rideshare becomes a high-stakes game of cat and mouse when Jaq and Shane receive an Amber Alert on their phones. When they spot the kidnappers car with the girl in the back seat, they desperately race against time to save her before its too late. Starring Hayden Panettiere, Tyler James Williams, Kevin Dunn.

programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness
programme.desc: A Black artist finds his path to success derailed by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Together, they learn that forgetting might be harder than forgiving. Starring Andre Holland, John Earl Jelks, Andra Day.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Common Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Sean Freeman is not just pushing boundaries, he is redefining them; with nearly all dishes made from scratch and a kitchen that feels more like a lab of flavor, Common is chasing Michelin-level recognition in a city steeped in tradition.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Parkers Smoked Meats
programme.desc: Darrel Parker learned the art of barbecue from his father, who smoked meat for over 40 years; at Parkers, he keeps that legacy alive with dishes like lamb burgers, pork chop sandwiches and smoked turkey legs.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Simple Soul of Savannah
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Silvers is changing how we think about soul food; self-taught and driven, she puts a healthier spin on classics with dishes like meatless cabbage and collards, fried whiting and pot roast.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narra Tree
programme.desc: A tight-knit group of Filipino friends opened Narra Tree, Savannahs first Filipino restaurant; their menu is packed with soul, oxtail kare kare and pork sisig carry stories of tradition, resilience and shared dreams.

programme.title: What Would You Do for Love?
programme.desc: A fitness trainer who was living paycheck to paycheck decides to keep his new multimillionaire status a secret when he goes on a dating blitz to find true love in 30 days or less.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Family Time - Powering Down
programme.desc: Tony feels his family is drifting apart so he bans technology in the household.

programme.title: Family Time - The Oops Baby
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa must deal with the possibility of a new baby.

programme.title: Family Time - Cut It Out
programme.desc: Tony spends time in the local barbershop with friends; Lori considers her options for having a baby.

programme.desc: Tony and Lisa find out that they dont have as much as theyd like; Lisa discovers she can make some extra money on social media; Donnie is driving for Goober and one of his clients is a little shady.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Halls sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: The Dead Dont Hurt (2023)
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner.

programme.title: Welcome to Sarajevo (1997)
programme.desc: A British war reporter (Stephen Dillane) becomes obsessed with an orphanage near the front lines in 1992.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: In order to save mankind, scientists and astronauts must set off a nuclear device at the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2 (2010)
programme.desc: After experiencing what they think are break-ins, a family realizes that the events unfolding before them are more sinister than they seem.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Day of the Fight (2023)
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: Charismatic Englishman James Hunt (Chris Hemsworth) and Austrian perfectionist Niki Lauda (Daniel Bruhl) burn up the 1970s Formula 1 racing scene and share an intense rivalry on the track.

programme.title: Night of the Sicario (2021)
programme.desc: Taking refuge in a womans home, a DEA agent must protect a federal witnesss family from vicious cartel gunmen.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Heartburn (1986)
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: The Quiet American (2002)
programme.desc: A veteran English journalist (Michael Caine) and a young man (Brendan Fraser) vie for the affection of a Vietnamese woman (Do Thi Hai Yen) in the 1950s.

programme.title: Kokomo City (2023)
programme.desc: Four Black transgender sex workers tell their life stories in intimate and candid interviews.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Vindicta (2023)
programme.desc: When a city is terrorized by a sadistic serial killer, a seasoned detective and a newly recruited paramedic are forced into a deadly game of vengeance, only to discover the key to stopping the bloodshed lies in unlocking the truth of their own pasts.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: What If (2013)
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her fathers killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and 40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: Grease (1978)
programme.desc: Nice Sandy (Olivia Newton-John) and greaser Danny (John Travolta) try to be like each other in their 1950s high school.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland are a married couple; Michael Roland’s controlling behavior leads a pregnant Madison Roland to leave the home; she later discovers that her previous circumstances continue to affect her current life.

programme.title: Assassination Nation (2018)
programme.desc: A small town gets turned upside down when an anonymous hacker reveals personal messages and secrets of thousands of people. As anger erupts into full-blown violence, four teenage girls find themselves in a fight for their lives against an armed mob.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: Heartburn (1986)
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.
